overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian temple complex on a sunny day. The character moves through a ceremonial courtyard adorned with banners and palm trees, approaches the massive stone temple entrance flanked by obelisks, and enters the shadowed interior corridor with hieroglyphic columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial courtyard with palm trees and hanging banners

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sunlit courtyard toward the temple complex, passing decorative planters and banners

entered.detail: white and orange fabric canopies suspended between tall wooden poles lining the courtyard
tall palm trees in large decorative planters flanking the walkway
massive ancient Egyptian temple with hieroglyphic carvings and towering entrance visible in the distance
large black ceramic planters with gold trim containing palm trees and vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide ceremonial courtyard bathed in bright sunlight. The camera follows the character walking forward on stone paving scattered with flower petals, passing between palm trees and under decorative banners. The massive temple facade looms in the distance while a few NPCs wander the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple forecourt with massive stone obelisks

events.description: entering the temple forecourt with towering stone obelisks flanking the approach

agents.ego_description: walking toward the massive temple entrance between two tall stone obelisks, with the hieroglyphic-covered facade dominating the view

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white robes walking across the temple forecourt

entered.detail: pair of tall dark stone obelisks with hieroglyphic inscriptions flanking the temple entrance
massive stone gateway with carved reliefs marking the entrance to the temple interior

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open courtyard into the temple forecourt, where two massive stone obelisks frame the approach to the entrance. The temple facade with its detailed hieroglyphic carvings grows larger as the camera advances. A few pedestrians in period clothing walk through the plaza as the character approaches the shadowed gateway.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior corridor with hieroglyphic columns

events.description: transitioning from bright sunlight into the shadowed temple interior through the massive gateway
passing through the stone gateway into the narrow columned corridor with painted hieroglyphs

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow temple entrance into the interior corridor, passing between massive columns

notable_agents.action: temple visitor in green dress walking toward the exit

entered.detail: narrow stone passage leading deeper into the temple complex with walls covered in hieroglyphs
massive stone columns with colorful painted bases and hieroglyphic carvings lining the corridor
large bronze fire bowls on stands flanking the entrance pathway

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple through the massive stone gateway, transitioning from bright sunlight into the shadowed interior. The space narrows into a corridor lined with massive columns featuring colorful painted bases and hieroglyphic reliefs. Bronze braziers flank the path as the character walks deeper into the temple, passing other visitors exiting the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open ceremonial courtyard into the shadowed depths of an ancient Egyptian temple. It begins by following the character across sun-drenched stone paving scattered with flower petals, passing beneath decorative banners and palm trees. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward the temple forecourt, where two massive stone obelisks frame the approach and the detailed hieroglyphic carvings of the facade grow larger. The camera then transitions from the brilliant sunlight into the cool shade of the massive stone gateway, narrowing into an interior corridor. Finally, the environment transforms into a colonnade of massive pillars with colorful painted bases and bronze braziers as the character walks deeper into the temple.
